title: The Promise to Grow Stronger: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Usopp, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10 as the scene develops across pages 6–9.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Usopp, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then I suppose this is you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I will not give you a boat.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Doesn't he seem to be weakening?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: I challenge you to a duel!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Now, I am willing to inform you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Why the sudden change of heart...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Grand Line: Isle of White Earth, Balltingo

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: at any rate, both I and inazuma...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Emits a signal that blocks call interrogation.

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Usopp, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger: rising conflict.
